model.name: vm_penduduk
vm_eligibility
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_eligibility AS SELECT eligibility_id, program_id, nik, status_eligible, validated_at, validated_by FROM bansos_db.eligibility;

model.name: vm_program_bansos
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_program_bansos AS SELECT program_id, nama_program AS program_name, CAST(nominal AS BIGINT) AS nominal FROM bansos_db.master_program_bansos;

model.name: vm_penerima
vm_penduduk_detail
vm_keluarga
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_keluarga AS SELECT k.no_kk, k.alamat, p.nama FROM bansos_db.master_keluarga k JOIN bansos_db.master_penduduk p ON k.no_kk = p.nik_id;
